llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 15.1 (lease for 3150 Granger Way) was moved up to be taken after item 10.1 (Report Out on Closed Session) and before the community/staff recognition items. Board President announced this change and asked for approval before the agenda was formally approved.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do I have a motion to approve? So move. Second. All right, Maria and Janet, roll call vote, please.

items.intro_words: Okay, great. Well, we'll do roll call then. Eliana, please.
Okay, great. Well, we'll do roll call then. Eliana, please.
Let me report out on the closed session. We accepted the staff recommendation.
And then I'd like to welcome everybody to tonight's meeting.
I need to see if we have any changes to the agenda. Can I make a recommendation?
So do I have a motion to approve? So moved. Second.
Under oral communication, we do have a couple of folks who would like to speak.
Onward to community and staff recognition. 9.1. Am I turning that over to you?
Hello, everyone. I just need Kyle to pull up the. The presentation.
And we have another level of recognition. Our retirees, I believe, are next.
Alrighty, so we're on to 10.1 Ryan Alternative Schools multicultural presentation.
So we're on to 15.1, which is the lease. Yes, this is the lease for the 3150 Granger Way this evening.
So we have the bond program, consent items. Do I have a motion to approve?
All right, we're on to 12.1. And this is an adoption of resolution 20 2022.
All right, so I believe we'll move on to the next agenda item. Thank you. Okay, so we have the bond program, consent items.
All right, so 13.2, comprehensive and targeted school improvement. Yes, thank you so much to Elisa McAvoy and Janet Lawson
All right, 13.3, which is on transfer of funds. Yes. So this is a new policy
All right, so we're on to 13.4 student activity funds. Okay, the student activity funds, we actually have this in place.
All right. So we are on to 13.5, which is parcel taxes. Parcel taxes.
All right. 13.6, which is non discrimination harassment. Yeah, so actually you've seen this board policy multiple times
All right. 13.7, comprehensive health education. Yes. So this board policy is an update.
All right, we're on to consent items, and there's just the one, which is adoption of district mission, vision, and values.
All right, this is Wolf, and she will lead us through the expanded learning opportunities grant plan.
I'll go out first. Okay. I just have one thing. It was the superintendent Advisory council.
All right. Information. We have a. A few things on the information. San Mateo County Investment Fund.
All right. And any correspondence? I know we've gotten a few emails kind of reopening, that sort of thing.
And other business suggested items for future agenda. All right. And board agenda calendar.
So do I have a motion to adjourn? Hello? Second.
